task_completion.description: Open the human preproinsulin GenBank file in UGENE
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UGENE application is open and displays the 'human_insulin_gene.gb' sequence and its annotations (e.g., mat_peptide features).

task_completion.description: Export the Insulin B chain nucleotide sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in UGENE saving a sequence to 'insulin_B_nt.fasta', or a terminal/file manager showing the file 'insulin_B_nt.fasta' has been created in the '~/UGENE_Data/chains/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the translated Insulin B chain amino acid sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in UGENE configured to translate and save to 'insulin_B_aa.fasta', or a terminal/file manager showing the file 'insulin_B_aa.fasta' has been created.

task_completion.description: Export the Insulin A chain nucleotide sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in UGENE saving a sequence to 'insulin_A_nt.fasta', or a terminal/file manager showing the file 'insulin_A_nt.fasta' has been created.

task_completion.description: Export the translated Insulin A chain amino acid sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in UGENE configured to translate and save to 'insulin_A_aa.fasta', or a terminal/file manager showing the file 'insulin_A_aa.fasta' has been created.

task_completion.description: Create a summary report documenting the amino acid lengths of both chains
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command creating/viewing 'chain_report.txt' in '~/UGENE_Data/chains/'. The text must explicitly mention the amino acid lengths of both chains (Insulin B: 30 AA, Insulin A: 21 AA).

integrity.description: The agent used the UGENE graphical interface to extract the sequences
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the UGENE GUI (selecting annotations, using export menus) rather than exclusively using terminal commands (like grep/awk) or writing a Python script to parse the .gb file.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the expected sequences directly into the files
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen typing or echoing the exact amino acid sequences (e.g., 'FVNQHLCGSHLVEALYLVCGERGFFYTPKT') directly into the terminal to bypass the extraction and translation steps.

integrity.description: The report file was created in the correct directory with the correct name
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'chain_report.txt' is created in '~/UGENE_Data/chains/' and not elsewhere, and the lengths documented match the actual extracted data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Insulin A chain: 63 nucleotides (nt), 21 amino acids (AA). Target A chain AA sequence: GIVEQCCTSICSLYQLENYCN. Insulin B chain: 90 nucleotides (nt), 30 amino acids (AA). Target B chain AA sequence: FVNQHLCGSHLVEALYLVCGERGFFYTPKT. Expected files in ~/UGENE_Data/chains/: insulin_A_nt.fasta, insulin_A_aa.fasta, insulin_B_nt.fasta, insulin_B_aa.fasta, chain_report.txt.
